{{CargoRelic
|name=Planetary Engine Diagram
|class_id=20376
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Engineers across the world work day and night for the great "planet-development of mankind" project, and have successfully worked out a prototypical engine that can drive the entire planet forward. Although the device is still at a primary stage, the potential in it is attractive enough to drive people into taking risks.
|fame=17
|art=16
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=30
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +3m
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +6m
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +9m
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +9m
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +9m<br> (Awakened)
}}
